articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EC) No 300/2008
articles.summary: Amends aviation security regulation for AI components.

articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EU) No 167/2013
articles.summary: Amends agricultural/forestry vehicles regulation for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EU) No 168/2013
articles.summary: Amends two/three-wheel vehicles regulation for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Directive 2014/90/EU
articles.summary: Amends marine equipment directive for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Directive (EU) 2016/797
articles.summary: Amends railway interoperability directive for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EU) 2018/858
articles.summary: Amends motor vehicles regulation for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EU) 2018/1139
articles.summary: Amends civil aviation safety regulation for AI.

articles.title: Amendment to Regulation (EU) 2019/2144
articles.summary: Amends motor vehicle type-approval for AI.

articles.title: Transitional Provisions
articles.summary: Existing systems on market before applicable dates have until 2027 to comply. GPAI models on market before August 2025 must comply within 2 years.

articles.title: Evaluation and Review
articles.summary: Commission evaluates by August 2029 and every 4 years thereafter.

articles.title: Entry into Force and Application
articles.summary: Enters into force 1 August 2024. Phased: 6 months (prohibitions), 12 months (GPAI), 24 months (high-risk), 36 months (Annex I).

articles.title: Addressees
articles.summary: Binding in its entirety and directly applicable in all Member States.
